description_long: This gatehouse features a tall, narrow structure with a steeply pitched, dark slate roof and a prominent central chimney. The walls are constructed from light-colored stone with visible timber framing, giving it a classic medieval European appearance. A small annex with a lower roof extends from one side, featuring an arched stone entryway and a lantern hanging above. The main building has a small, shuttered window and a larger, blue-trimmed window near the roofline, while the annex includes a round-topped window. Decorative elements include a weather vane atop the roof and exposed wooden beams. The overall design suggests a fortified yet welcoming entry point, likely serving as a checkpoint or passage between urban districts.
description: A tall, medieval-style stone and timber gatehouse with a steep slate roof, arched entryway, and decorative details like a weather vane and lantern.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tall, narrow profile, steep roof, and a small shuttered window with visible timber framing.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the arched stone entryway, lantern, annex with a round-topped window, and the weather vane on the roof.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the main building's height, blue-trimmed window near the roof, and the annex's roof structure.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the annex, the main building's plain stone wall, and the full expanse of the slate roof.
attribute_entryway_design: arched stone doorway with a wooden door and hanging lantern
attribute_window_placement: small shuttered and blue-trimmed windows on upper levels, round-topped window on annex
